task_completion.description: Verify that the employee profile for ID 1042 is opened in AttendHRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The AttendHRM application is open, showing the employee profile screen with Employee ID '1042' (or 'EMP-1042').

task_completion.description: Verify navigation to the Qualifications tab or section for the employee.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Qualifications' or 'Education' tab/window is active within the employee profile.

task_completion.description: Verify the qualification and specialization are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text fields or dropdowns for Qualification and Specialization contain 'MBA' and 'Finance' respectively.
The Institution/University text field contains 'University of Michigan'.

task_completion.description: Verify the year of passing and grade are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Year/Year of Passing field contains '2018' and the Grade/Percentage field contains '3.8'.

task_completion.description: Verify the remarks are entered and the record is saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Remarks field contains 'Graduated with distinction' and there is evidence of saving (e.g., clicking a Save button, or the new record appearing in the employee's qualifications list).

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual AttendHRM application GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the AttendHRM interface being used, not a terminal, script editor, or database management tool.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the expected answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data entry must happen within the AttendHRM application's form fields, not in Notepad or a similar text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the record was actually added to the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots should ideally show the qualification listed in the employee's saved profile data, rather than just typed into an unsaved form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target employee ID is 1042. Note that in the actual AttendHRM database, Employee ID 1042 is named 'Dexter Riley', NOT 'Robert Clarke' as stated in the prompt. Do not penalize the agent if the employee name appears as Dexter Riley, as long as the ID is 1042.
